projectDescription: An OpenAI-compatible proxy that aggregates free-tier API keys from 14 AI providers with automatic failover, rate-limit tracking, and encrypted key storage — giving you a single unified endpoint backed by ~1.3B tokens/month of free inference capacity.
keyFeatures: Single OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint aggregating 14 free-tier AI providers
Automatic failover: on 429/5xx, the router cools down the key and retries the next model in the fallback chain
Per-key rate tracking (RPM, RPD, TPM, TPD) with sliding-window counters so the router never exceeds free-tier caps
Sticky sessions for multi-turn conversations to prevent hallucination from mid-conversation model switches
AES-256-GCM encrypted key storage in SQLite — provider keys never leave the server in plaintext
Unified bearer token for client authentication; provider keys are never exposed to callers
Streaming (SSE) and non-streaming responses, plus full OpenAI-style tool calling across all providers
Admin dashboard (React + Vite) for managing keys, reordering fallback chain, inspecting analytics, and running playground prompts
Lightweight: ~40 MB RSS at idle; runs on a Raspberry Pi 4 under PM2
